zh.lifeSummary: 當Hugh Dickinson於1422年出生在英國英格蘭越可爾 易亞斯特 利丁赫爾時，他的父親Thomas Dickinson34歲，母親Margaret Lambert18歲。他於1451年與Agnes De Swillington在英國越可爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1509年在英國英格蘭韋斯特 越可爾利德斯享年87歲。

nameMeanings.name: Dickinson
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of Dickenson , a patronymic from the Middle English personal name Dicun a pet form of Richard (see Dicken ) + son.
History: Jonathan Dickinson, the first president of the College of New Jersey (now Princeton), was born in Hatfield, MA, in 1688. Both his parents came from pioneer Connecticut Valley stock.

variants.name: Dickenson
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Dicun, a pet form of Richard (see Dicken ) + son.

nameMeanings.name: Hugh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name, Hugues, Hugo, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from hug ‘heart, mind, spirit’. It was originally a short form of various compound names containing this element. This was borne by the aristocracy of medieval France, adopted by the Normans, and introduced by them to Britain. It was consistently one of the most popular boys' names in the Middle Ages in England, but fell out of favour in the 16th century until it was revived in the 20th century. Little Hugh of Lincoln was a child supposed in the Middle Ages to have been murdered by Jews in about 1255 , a legend responsible for several outbursts of anti-Semitism at various times. The story is referred to by Chaucer in The Prioress's Tale. He is not to be confused with St Hugh of Lincoln ( 1140–1200 ), bishop of Lincoln ( 1186–1200 ), who was noted for his charity and good works, his piety, and his defence of the Church against the State. Since the later Middle Ages Hugh has also been used as an Anglicized form of the Gaelic name Aodh .

en.lifeSummary: When Hugh Dickinson was born in 1422, in Hull, Yorkshire East Riding, England, United Kingdom, his father, Thomas Dickinson, was 34 and his mother, Margaret Lambert, was 18. He married Agnes De Swillington in 1451, in Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died in 1509, in Leeds, West Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 87.

Il a épousé Agnes De Swillington en 1451, à Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1509, à Leeds, West Yorkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 87 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Hugh Dickinsonが1422年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイア エアスト リディングハルで生まれた時，父Thomas Dickinsonは34歳，母Margaret Lambertは18歳であった。1451年にイギリスヨークシュアイアでAgnes De Swillingtonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1509年にイギリスイギリスウエスト ヨークシュアイアリーズで87歳で死去した。

ko.Kingston upon Hull St Mary, Yorkshire, E: 영국 요르크실르 킨그스턴 업 훌 스트 메리

ko.lifeSummary: Hugh Dickinson(이)가 1422년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 이스트 리딩 훌에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Dickinson(은)는 34세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Lambert(은)는 18세였다. 그는 1451년 영국 요르크실르에서 Agnes De Swillington(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1509년 영국 잉글랜드 웨스트 요르크실르 리드즈에서 87세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.Hull, Yorkshire East Riding, England, Un: хулл, еркшир эаст ридинг, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hugh Dickinson родился в 1422 г. в местности хулл, еркшир эаст ридинг, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Thomas Dickinson было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret Lambert, 18. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnes De Swillington в 1451 г. в местности еркшир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1509 г. в местности лидс, вест еркшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 87 лет.
